core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix disparate styles (Disney+ vs Headspace vs Old Books)
Emotion First: Every theme evokes a specific feeling (Wonder, Calm, Play, Nostalgia)
Tactile Surfaces: Glass, Paper, and Plastic textures over flat colors
Micro-Interactions: Delightful animations for every state change

magical.name: Magical Glow
magical.description: Soft glossy aesthetics, lavender-sky-peach gradients. Disney+ meets Headspace.

bedtime.name: Bedtime Mode
bedtime.description: Deep navy background, warm off-white text, cozy glow. For night reading.

pixar.name: Pixar Bright
pixar.description: Vibrant, glossy, squircle shapes. High energy and playful.

parchment.name: Parchment
parchment.description: Warm paper, sepia tones, classic storybook feel.

implementation_steps.description: Update `src/index.css` to include the CSS variables for all themes. Use standard `.theme-name` classes or `[data-theme='name']` selector.
Update `tailwind.config.js` to ensure all colors map to CSS variables. Remove hardcoded hex values.
implementation_steps.instruction: Map 'indigo', 'amber', 'teal' to `var(--primary)`, `var(--accent)` etc. to ensure semantic switching.

implementation_steps.description: Create `ThemeContext.js` and `ThemeProvider` to manage state (localStorage persistence).

implementation_steps.design_notes: Use a dropdown or a cycle button. For 'Anti-AI' flair, make it a floating orb or a magical toggle in the navbar.

implementation_steps.description: Refactor `Navbar.js` and `LandingPage.js` to use the new ThemeSwitcher and replace hardcoded hex colors with Tailwind semantic classes (e.g., `text-primary`, `bg-background`).
Update `.glass-panel` class in `index.css` to use variables.

gradients.parchment: bg-[#FDFBF7] relative after:content-[''] after:fixed after:inset-0 after:bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] after:opacity-20 after:pointer-events-none

universal_guidelines: NEVER use hardcoded hex codes for colors in components. Always use `bg-primary`, `text-muted-foreground`, etc.
Ensure the `data-theme` attribute is applied to the `<body>` or root `<div>`.

Transition all theme changes smoothly: `* { transition: background-color 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease; }` (Use carefully, maybe apply to specific containers to avoid layout thrashing).
For the 'Parchment' theme, ensure standard border-radius is small (0.5rem) to feel like a book, while 'Magical' and 'Pixar' use large rounded corners.
